disciplines.title: Biology & Life Sciences
disciplines.description: Biological systems from molecules and cells to organisms and ecosystems.

disciplines.title: Medicine & Health
disciplines.description: Human health, clinical care, diagnostics, therapeutics, epidemiology, and public health.

disciplines.title: Chemistry & Materials
disciplines.description: Chemical composition and reactions, molecular design, and the structure, properties, and processing of materials.

disciplines.title: Physics & Astronomy
disciplines.description: Fundamental physical phenomena, matter and energy, and astronomical and space systems.

disciplines.title: Earth & Environmental Sciences
disciplines.description: The solid Earth, atmosphere, oceans, climate, water, and coupled environmental systems.

disciplines.title: Agriculture, Food & Animal Sciences
disciplines.description: Crop and soil production, food systems, forestry, fisheries, and animal and veterinary sciences.

disciplines.title: Mathematics & Statistics
disciplines.description: Pure and applied mathematics, probability, statistics, optimization, and quantitative inference.

disciplines.title: Computing & Data Science
disciplines.description: Computer science, artificial intelligence, data systems, scientific computing, and software research.

disciplines.title: Engineering & Technology
disciplines.description: Design, analysis, manufacture, operation, and reliability of engineered systems and technologies.

disciplines.title: Social & Behavioral Sciences
disciplines.description: Human behavior, cognition, language, economics, policy, and social systems.
